cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. There are five teammates: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Initially, they each have specific positions. So, at the start: - Alice is fullback - Bob is center midfielder - Claire is right midfielder - Dave is left winger - Eve is goalkeeper Now, they're going to swap positions multiple times, and the question is asking what position Eve is playing at the end. Let me track each swap step by step. Maybe I should list each swap and keep updating their positions. First swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. After this, Dave becomes goalkeeper and Eve becomes left winger. Second swap: Claire and Bob trade positions. So Claire, who was right midfielder, becomes center midfielder (Bob's original position), and Bob becomes right midfielder. Third swap: Alice and Bob trade positions. Alice was fullback, Bob was right midfielder after the second swap. So now, Alice is right midfielder and Bob is fullback. Fourth swap: Eve and Dave trade positions again. Before this swap, Eve was left winger (from first swap) and Dave was goalkeeper (from first swap). So after swapping back, Eve becomes goalkeeper again and Dave becomes left winger again. Fifth swap: Bob and Alice trade positions. Before this swap, Alice was right midfielder and Bob was fullback. So after swapping, Bob becomes right midfielder and Alice becomes fullback. Wait, but let me double check. Let me do this step by step. Initial positions: - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper First swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. Now: - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger Second swap: Claire and Bob trade positions. Now: - Alice: fullback - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger Third swap: Alice and Bob trade positions. Now: - Alice: right midfielder - Bob: fullback - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger Fourth swap: Eve and Dave trade positions. Now: - Alice: right midfielder - Bob: fullback - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper Fifth swap: Bob and Alice trade positions.
